days.title: Arrival in Tokyo
days.subtitle: Exploring Tsukiji and Shibuya

timeline.title: Arrive at Narita International Airport
timeline.detail: Your flight arrives at Narita at 10:00. Proceed through customs and collect your luggage before heading to the city.

timeline.title: Take Express Train to Tokyo
timeline.detail: Catch the Narita Express for a smooth 1-hour ride into Tokyo. Enjoy the scenic views en route to the city center.

timeline.title: Check in to Hotel Gracery Shinjuku
timeline.detail: Drop off your luggage at Hotel Gracery Shinjuku, located centrally in the vibrant Shinjuku district. Freshen up before heading out.

timeline.title: Lunch at Tsukiji Outer Market
timeline.detail: Explore the famous Tsukiji Outer Market, sampling fresh sushi, grilled seafood, and local street food. Try the tuna sashimi for a real treat.

timeline.title: Stroll through Hamarikyu Gardens
timeline.detail: After lunch, head to the tranquil Hamarikyu Gardens nearby. Enjoy the beautiful landscapes and a serene atmosphere to unwind.

timeline.title: Visit Shibuya Crossing
timeline.detail: Experience the bustling Shibuya Crossing, famous for its organized chaos. Perfect spot for photos and to feel the energy of Tokyo.

timeline.title: Dinner at Ichiran Ramen
timeline.detail: Savor the flavors of tonkotsu ramen at Ichiran, where you customize your meal to your preference. Don't miss their signature red sauce.

localTips: Purchase a Suica card for convenient travel on trains and subways.
Try to visit the Tsukiji Outer Market early to avoid crowds.
Dynamic restaurants often have long queues; consider dining times earlier or later than typical Japanese meals.

days.title: Culinary Adventures in Tokyo
days.subtitle: From Street Food to Fine Dining

timeline.title: Breakfast at Hotel
timeline.detail: Enjoy a delicious breakfast at the hotel, offering a good mix of Western and Japanese dishes to fuel your day.

timeline.title: Explore Asakusa and Senso-ji Temple
timeline.detail: Wander around Asakusa, visiting the iconic Senso-ji Temple. Sample local snacks at Nakamise Street leading to the temple.

timeline.title: Lunch at Sola Pasta Bar
timeline.detail: Experience fusion cuisine at Sola, a recognized spot for its fresh pasta dishes inspired by Japanese flavors. Book in advance.

timeline.title: Shopping in Harajuku
timeline.detail: Visit Takeshita Street for trendy shops and quirky street food. Look out for famous crepes and matcha treats.

timeline.title: Experience Akihabara
timeline.detail: Dive into the electronic town of Akihabara. Explore shops full of anime, manga, and the latest in tech gadgets.

timeline.title: Dining at Sukiyabashi Jiro
timeline.detail: Enjoy an exquisite sushi dinner at the renowned Sukiyabashi Jiro, known for its meticulous attention to detail and the best sushi in Tokyo. Reservations are a must.

timeline.title: Return to Hotel
timeline.detail: Head back to your hotel to unwind and reflect on your memorable culinary journey through Tokyo.

localTips: Try to arrive early for Sola Pasta Bar as it often fills quickly.
Bring cash to small eateries and stalls, as not all accept credit cards.
Learn a few Japanese phrases - it can enhance your interactions with locals.

hotels.name: Hotel Gracery Shinjuku
hotels.note: Famous hotel with Godzilla-themed rooms, 5-min walk from Shinjuku Station.

urgent.label: Book Jiro's Dinner Reservation
urgent.note: Reservations are highly advised due to popularity.

urgent.label: Reserve at Sola Pasta Bar
urgent.note: This popular spot can fill up quickly; reservations recommended.
